title: Crusalis utils
description: A modification of PingIsFun's Hitbox+ mod with features made for Crusalis and other geopol servers using the Nodes plugin
body:
Crusalis utils is a modified version of PingIsFun's Hitbox+ mod with features made explicitly for Crusalis (and any other servers running the Nodes plugin).

**This mod is approved and endorsed by staff.**

Users manual FAQ and any other important information can be found in the dedicated discord server:  
[discord.gg/Kq4SH4KT4T](https://discord.gg/W5QXeZddaH)
